news.t: Profound to Showcase TULSA-PRO®, the TULSA Procedure™ and the Future of iMRI at AUA2026
Profound Medical Reports Strong First Quarter 2026 Financial Results

holdings.infoBox: PRN is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 6.15%, Comfort Systems USA at 4.74%, Sterling Infrastructure at 4.49%, Jabil at 4.26%, and Argan at 4.19%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Industrials Momentum ETF (PRN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. industrial firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PRN was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
